overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking along a coastal landscape. The scene transitions from a bright golden-hour sunset over sandy dunes to a dark red, ominous atmosphere along the shoreline with abandoned wooden boats.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy coastal dunes with wooden fishing racks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through sandy dunes toward the sunset, passing wooden drying racks

entered.detail: wooden frame structures used for drying fishing nets, casting long shadows on the sand
rolling sandy terrain with visible footprints and wind patterns
large rocky outcrop silhouetted against the bright sky
intense golden-orange sun low on the horizon creating dramatic backlighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through open sandy dunes bathed in intense golden-hour light. Wooden fishing racks stand on either side while the sun sits low on the horizon ahead, casting long shadows across the wind-patterned sand.

events.description: moves from open dunes into tall coastal grass approaching the ocean shoreline

agents.ego_description: moving through tall grass toward the shoreline with the ocean visible ahead

entered.detail: tall white-topped grass swaying in the wind along the path
calm sea visible in the distance reflecting the golden sunlight

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from open dunes into a path lined with tall coastal grass. The ocean becomes visible to the left while the bright sun continues to dominate the horizon ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark red lit beach with abandoned boats

events.description: lighting shifts dramatically from golden sunset to dark red ominous atmosphere
beached wooden boats appear along the shoreline as the environment turns blood-red

agents.ego_description: walking along the darkened beach past abandoned wooden boats with waves lapping the shore

entered.detail: abandoned wooden fishing boat resting on the sand with weathered hull
gentle waves rolling onto the shore reflecting the red light
ominous blood-red sky with the sun diffused through red haze
wet sand mixed with small rocks along the waterline

segments.scene_description: The atmosphere shifts dramatically to a dark red hue as the character reaches the shoreline. Abandoned wooden boats rest on the beach while waves lap at the sand, all bathed in an ominous blood-red light.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark red beach with wooden posts and beached vessels

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoreline past wooden posts and multiple beached vessels in the red twilight

entered.detail: tall wooden posts and pier remnants sticking up from the sand
multiple abandoned boats lined up along the beach

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the dark red beach, passing additional beached boats and wooden pier structures. The ominous red lighting persists as waves continue to roll onto the shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a coastal landscape that transforms from a radiant golden sunset into an ominous, blood-red shoreline. It begins with the character walking through open sandy dunes and wooden fishing racks bathed in intense golden-hour light. As the path narrows, the camera moves through tall coastal grass while the ocean first becomes visible to the left under the dominating sun. The atmosphere then shifts dramatically to a dark red hue as the character reaches the beach, where abandoned wooden boats rest in an ominous light. Finally, the camera continues along the shoreline, passing further beached boats and wooden pier structures as waves roll onto the sand under the persisting crimson sky.
